title: pternandra teysmanniana
intro: Pternandra teysmanniana, also known as the Borneo gardenia, is a flowering plant species in the family Sapotaceae. It is traditionally used in Southeast Asian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Pternandra teysmanniana include reducing fever, alleviating headaches, and treating respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or poultices, and are often used in folk medicine to treat various ailments.
